arts.ttl: Chelsea offered chance to REIGNITE pursuit of 'next Mbappe'
arts.sum: PSG star Bradley Barcola is unsure about extending his contract, according to French media. PSG, it is claimed, want to extend the winger's contract and hand him improved terms, but Barcola has made it clear to the Parisians that he will not make a decision before the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Chelsea Believe 'Exceptional' Star Wants to Join Them Over Man Utd
arts.sum: Exclusive: Chelsea believe that Ipswich Town star Liam Delap would be open to joining them over Man Utd this summer.

arts.ttl: Man United are “confident they could convince” 35-G/A Chelsea target to join them
arts.sum: Manchester United have struggled to score goals consistently this season, and they have identified Victor Osimhen as a solution to their problems. The 26-year-old Nigerian International is currently on loan at Galatasaray in Turkey, and he has 29 goals and six assists to his name in all competitions. arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho shares the lengths one Chelsea fan went to stop him becoming manager, ‘told me…’
Club ‘intensively considering’ future with Chelsea man – ‘Realistic solution’ worked up
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund are ‘intensively considering’ what to do about Chelsea loanee Carney Chukwuemeka at the end of the season. That’s according to Ruhr Nachrichten, relayed by BVBWLD, who explain what the current thinking at the German club is. arts.sum: Chelsea defender John Terry captained the side to multiple league titles under Jose Mourinho but the final season before Mourinho's arrival saw Arsenal go unbeaten
